subject: grammar
title: Exercise 1 — Adjective Order
instruction:
Read the students' responses. Some of the adjectives they used are underlined. If they are used correctly, put a tick (✓). If they are wrong, write the correct answer.

Example: 1 → quiet little ✓ (already shown)
passage:
My favourite place is a quiet little wood near my home town in Indonesia. I like it because it is a peaceful green place. It is full of tall old trees and there are lots of interesting wild animals.

I'm going to tell you about my bedroom. I love it because it is full of my things. The walls are painted with blue and yellow stripes, and there is a dark wooden floor. There is a lovely old photo of my family by my bed, and all my precious books are on the shelves.

My favourite place is the town I grew up in. It has a beautiful ancient ruined castle and lots of historical old buildings. The streets are narrow and winding, and there are lots of good shops. It is busy and noisy, but I like that. I feel good there because I have so many happy childhood memories.

questions.text: I like it because it is a green peaceful place.
It is full of old tall trees
...and there are lots of wild interesting animals.
The walls are painted with blue yellow stripes,
...and there is a wooden dark floor.
There is a lovely old photo of my family by my bed,
It has an ancient beautiful ruined castle
It is busy noisy, but I like that.
I have so many childhood happy memories.
